wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
It’s very important to feel good in my clothes. I like fashion that suits me. I love fashion & there is no easier way to express than through the clothes you wear.

SARA SMITH

hongo_animation_duration="1200"]A virtual environment should provide the appropriate responses – in real time- as the person explores their surroundings. The problems arise when there is a delay between the person’s actions and system response or latency which then disrupts their experience. The person becomes aware that they are in an artificial environment and adjusts their behaviour accordingly which results in a stilted, mechanical form of interaction.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text initial_loading_animation="fadeIn" hongo_animation_delay="400" hongo_animation_duration="1200"]

item.title: Fashion is a mirror reflecting the culture
item.dc:creator: lsadmin

[vc_row initial_loading_animation="fadeIn" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1565330261459{padding_bottom_mobile:40px},"][vc_column hongo_column_animation_style="fadeIn" width="" offset="vc_col-lg-offset-1 vc_col-lg-10 vc_col-md-12 vc_col-sm-offset-0 vc_col-xs-12" hongo_column_animation_delay="300"][hongo_section_heading hongo_heading_type="heading-style-3" title_heading_tag="h2" hongo_heading="Fashion is anything which is you and reflects your personality and if you are comfortable with what you wearing you'll look trendy and fashionable" hongo_font_title_setting=".hongo_font_1554201450963{align_lg:text-lg-left|weight_lg:text-lg-500},"][hongo_separator hongo_separator_style="separator-style-1" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" hongo_separator_height="1px" hongo_separator_width="100%" hongo_sep_bg_color="#e0e0e0" hongo_css=".vc_custom_1565331007742{margin-top: 37px !important;margin-bottom: 33px !important;}" hongo_responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1565331007747{margin_top_tablet:25px|margin_bottom_tablet:25px},"][vc_column_text]The standard chunk of Lorem Ipsum used since the 1500s is reproduced below for those interested. It is a long established fact a reader will be distracted the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal & distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

What you see & what you’re experiencing as you read these words is quite different." hongo_font_content_setting=".hongo_font_1554212691267{weight_lg:text-lg-400}," hongo_blockquote_author="Sara Smith"]Fashion is always of the time in which you live. It is not something standing alone. But the grand problem, the most important problem, is to rejeuvenate women. To make women look young. Then their outlook changes. They feel more joyous. The best fashion advice I’d say would be just to do what makes you comfortable and what makes you feel cute.[/hongo_blockquote][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" initial_loading_animation="fadeIn" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" css=".vc_custom_1563441068727{padding-top: 0px !important;padding-right: 7% !important;padding-bottom: 0px !important;padding-left: 7% !important;}" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1563441068731{padding_right_desktop:1.5%25|padding_left_desktop:1.5%25|padding_right_tablet:10px|padding_left_tablet:10px|padding_right_mobile:0px|padding_left_mobile:0px},"][vc_column hongo_column_animation_style="fadeIn" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1565331332853{margin_bottom_tablet:30px|margin_bottom_mobile:15px}," offset="vc_col-md-6"][vc_single_image image="34578" img_size="full" css_animation="none" css=".vc_custom_1567764797305{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column hongo_column_animation_style="fadeIn" hongo_column_animation_delay="200" offset="vc_col-md-6"][vc_single_image image="34578" img_size="full" css=".vc_custom_1567764811574{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width_header_sticky="0" initial_loading_animation="fadeIn" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1572675501556{padding_bottom_tablet:55px|padding_bottom_mobile:25px},"][vc_column hongo_column_animation_style="none" offset="vc_col-md-offset-0 vc_col-md-5 vc_col-xs-12"][vc_column_text hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1554270118174{margin_bottom_tablet:30px},"]
